calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Christina A. Diedoardo, Esq., representing Adrianne Castillo, Appellant/Defendant who is also present.
Timothy Christian, Respondent.

This cause comes on regularly as assigned by Dept. of Presiding Judge for trial de novo.
Timothy Christian testifies on his behalf.
The following exhibits are identified:
Exhibit A - Letter from Christina Diedoardo to Timothy Christian dated 12/16/09.
Exhibit B - Letter from Christina Diedoardo to Timothy Christian dated 12/29/09.

The following exhibits are identified and admitted in evidence:
Exhibit C - G-mail exchanges
Exhibit D1 - Check from A. Castillo to T. Christian, check no. 119, in the amount of $100.00.
Exhibit D2 - Check from A. Castillo to T. Christian, check no. 120, in the amount of $100.00.
Exhibit D3 - Check from A. Castillo to T. Christian, check no. 121, in the amount of $100.00.
Exhibit D4 - Check from A. Castillo to T. Christian, check no. 122, in the amount of $100.00.
Exhibit D5 - Check from A. Castillo to T. Christian, check no. 123, in the amount of $100.00.

Christian Diedoardo presents opening statement of Appellant, Adrianne Castillo.
The following document(s) is identified:
Exhibit 1 - Citation of case, Yoo vs. Jho, 147 CAL, APP, 4th, 1249 (2nd Dist, 2007)

Adrianne Castillo testifies on her behalf.

Upon hearing of the closing arguments, the Court tenders judgment in favor or Timothy Christian, the award in the amount of $550.00. In open court, Mr. Christian receives the $550.00 in cash from the Appellant, Ms. Castillo, through her counsel. The Court orders the return of exhibits to respective parties.

Acknowledgment of satisfaction of judgment is filed in open court. Copies are given to both parties by clerk.

Judge Tomar Mason, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported (D606).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Set For Trial On Mar-04-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 606

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Continued To Mar-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-13-2010 Continued To Mar-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 10:10am
Judge Pro Tem Nancy Newman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, department 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Adrianne Castillo, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Timothy Christian, appears in Pro Per.
Parties, previously sworn testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Newman. Appellant, Ms. Castillo, tells the Court she filed the appeal to protect her rights, but was actually ready to file a satisfaction of judgment. But, she appealed the matter to protect her rights. Therefore the matter was continued to allow parties to get together and discuss payment, and the filing of a satisfaction of judgment. Matter is continued to Mar-04-2010, 9:00am. If matter settles Appellant can file a dismissal of the action and not return to Court.
10:50am
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is marked or retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Continued To Nov-17-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
